DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was announced in court. DEFENDANTS LUKE WENDLER AND NOAH WENDLER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Off calendar. A First Amended Complaint was filed June 7, 2012. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. = (302/HEK)

Defendant'S Order To Show Cause To Plaintiff (Hearing: 6/12; Opp: 6/5; Reply: 6/8)
Off Calendar Jun-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Samer Danfoura, Esq., Law Offices, 415-970-8012, for defendant and moving party
Patricia E. Henle, Esq., Law Offices, 415-929-3197, specially appearing for plaintiff and opposing party

Plaintiff's attorney did not give notice of her intention to appear to contest the tentative ruling, the parties were ordered to meet and confer.
The matter was called a second time and after the hearing, the court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant'S Order To Show Cause is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
